name: ai-course-web
description: 陈龙彪团队人工智能公开课：VitePress 讲义、原生 Web PPT 与原创 PPTX

scripts.dev: npm run generate && vitepress dev docs
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run decks:verify && vitepress build docs
scripts.verify: npm run generate && npm run decks:verify && node scripts/verify-web-course.mjs && node scripts/audit-course-language.mjs && node scripts/audit-course-content.mjs && vitepress build docs
